artifact.source:
root = Card([heading, description, chart, table], "Application Error Rate", "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket from logs/app.log", "lg")

heading = Heading("ERROR Rate Over Time", "h3")
description = Text("Bucketed in 10-minute windows starting at each hour mark.", "muted")

errorData = Query("log_series", {file: "logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR", metric: "count"}, {data: [{bucket: "09:00", count: 0}, {bucket: "09:10", count: 3}, {bucket: "09:20", count: 5}, {bucket: "09:30", count: 8}, {bucket: "09:40", count: 4}, {bucket: "09:50", count: 2}], x: "bucket", y: "count"})

chart = Chart("bar", errorData.data, errorData.x, errorData.y, "ERROR count per 10-minute bucket", 340)

table = DataTable("Bucket Breakdown", [{key: "bucket", label: "Bucket Start"}, {key: "count", label: "ERROR Count"}], errorData.data, true)

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
root = Card([heading, description, chart, table], "Application Error Rate", "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket from logs/app.log", "lg")

heading = Heading("ERROR Rate Over Time", "h3")
description = Text("Bucketed in 10-minute windows starting at each hour mark.", "muted")

errorData = Query("log_series", {file: "logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR", metric: "count"}, {data: [{bucket: "09:00", count: 0}, {bucket: "09:10", count: 3}, {bucket: "09:20", count: 5}, {bucket: "09:30", count: 8}, {bucket: "09:40", count: 4}, {bucket: "09:50", count: 2}], x: "bucket", y: "count"})

chart = Chart("bar", errorData.data, errorData.x, errorData.y, "ERROR count per 10-minute bucket", 340)

table = DataTable("Bucket Breakdown", [{key: "bucket", label: "Bucket Start"}, {key: "count", label: "ERROR Count"}], errorData.data, true)
